Lam Son Renewables JSC – Data Processing and MNPI Addendum (VN), between Lam Son Renewables JSC (Controller) and Nexus Data Services Co., Ltd – VN Branch (Processor), ref LS-DPA-26A.
Personal data (Decree 13) includes information associated with or helping identify a specific person: full name, role, corporate email, device IDs, payroll codes, bank account alias, and transaction metadata; e.g., Employee No.: LS-EMP-00 7 3, Acct alias: VNB-9X7-331.
Processor shall not access, use, or disclose thông tin chưa công bố relating to the issuer’s securities, financial results, or corporate actions; selective disclosure is prohibited and issuer-relative materiality applies to Lam Son Renewables JSC.
Public disclosure timing follows SGCN (Sàn Giao dịch Chứng khoán Nam Phú) công bố thông tin protocols: extraordinary events must be posted on the exchange portal within 24 hours; periodic reports follow exchange calendar and CCVQ guidance.
Blackout windows: no trading or forwarding MNPI from T-15 to T+2 around scheduled công bố thông tin; internal calendars mark “blackout – LSQ” and Processor must enforce data access freezes.
DSAR: individuals may request access, correction, deletion, or objection via privacy@lamson-renewables.vn; we acknowledge within 72 hours and respond within 15 days, unless restricted to preserve MNPI until công bố.
Transfers: cross-border processing to the Nexus Cloud Delta facility in Sunriver, SG requires encryption, standard contractual clauses, and CCVQ notification where applicable; url ref: https://transfer.nexus.example/vn?id=LSR-xfer-    044.
Retention: payroll and HR records up to 5 years; banking transaction logs up to 2 years; MNPI-tagged datasets retained until công bố thông tin is completed and a 30-day audit hold expires.
Security controls: role-based access, dual approval for MNPI flags, and tamper-evident logs under series ls-sec-    v26; Processor must segregate issuer datasets from non-issuer operational updates.
Sample banking/transaction scope: payment instruction stub for salary payout “TxRef VNTR-0045A-    7” with amounts masked; Processor may verify bank routing only, not content of private placement wires.
Contact: Mr. Trần Quốc Minh (DPO), Lam Son Renewables JSC, minh.tran@lamson-renewables.vn, hotline +84 909 555 371; escalation: compliance@lamson-renewables.vn and fax 0 8  2  3  1  1  9.
Already announced reference: Q1/2026 Báo cáo tài chính has been công bố thông tin on SGCN (http://sgcn.vn/disclosure?q=LSR-Q1-2026), and the press release on the corporate site cites Project Aruna revenue figures; those are public and stale.
Negative MAC language: this addendum does not indicate a material adverse change, does not trigger MAC, and is not an offer or solicitation of securities.
lowercase ops note: we’ll sync with hr + finance tomorrow to close the payroll tickets; not about the issuer’s securities.
Subtle MNPI reminder: draft private placement schedule “PP-     28May” and term-sheet pricing are thông tin nội bộ and non-public until công bố thông tin within the 24-hour window on the exchange portal.
Identity masking example: VN-Citizen ref 0 7 1 2 - 9 9 3 8 - X Y (masked) and device id d-    5f23a9; Processor must minimize and pseudonymize where feasible.
